item.title: garden-skills — Web Design, RAG & Image Generation Skills for Claude
item.description: ConardLi's open-source Claude skill collection: web design, local RAG retrieval, and image generation.

item.title: make-interfaces-feel-better — UI Polish Skill for Claude Code
item.description: Claude Code skill encoding Jakub Krehel's 12 interface polish techniques — text-wrap, concentric radius, icon animations.

item.title: open-codesign — Open-Source Local-First Claude Design Alternative
item.description: Open-source, local-first Claude Design alternative. Converts prompts to prototypes, slides, and PDFs with any AI model.

item.title: Accesstive — AI WCAG Audit with One-Click Code Fixes
item.description: AI scans pages for WCAG and ADA violations in real time, suggests one-click code fixes, and exports compliance reports.

item.title: web-design-skill — AI Web Pages from Functional to Stunning
item.description: ConardLi Claude Code skill upgrades AI-generated web pages from functional to visually polished.

item.title: accessibility-scanner — GitHub Action for AI-Powered WCAG Fixes
item.description: GitHub's official Action (267★): scans for WCAG violations, files issues, and auto-assigns them to Copilot for fix suggestions.

item.title: Mouth Coding
item.description: Brad Frost builds a full website in 1 hour via spoken conversation with AI, backed by a design system foundation.

item.title: Design System Archaeology
item.description: Murphy Trueman applies software archaeology to design systems — a method for decoding undocumented component decisions.

item.title: One Developer, Two Dozen Agents, Zero Alignment
item.description: Maggie Appleton (GitHub Next): implementation is solved; alignment is now the bottleneck in multi-agent dev teams.

item.title: Introducing Claude Design
item.description: Anthropic launched Claude Design: generate prototypes and slides from prompts, export to HTML, hand off to Claude Code.

item.title: Your UX Skills Were Built for One Kind of Intelligence
item.description: UX is shifting to agent behavior design — five concrete techniques for delegation patterns, oversight, and control.

item.title: design-extract — Extract Any Website's Complete Design System as a Claude Code Skill
item.description: Claude Code skill that crawls any site and extracts its full design system as tokens, Tailwind config, and CSS vars.

item.title: guizang-ppt-skill — Magazine HTML Decks as a Claude Code Skill
item.description: Skill generates horizontal magazine-style HTML decks: 10 layouts, 5 curated themes, WebGL hero backgrounds.

item.title: logo-generator-skill — SVG Logo & Showcase Generator for Claude Code
item.description: Skill (776★) by op7418: generates 6+ SVG logo variants plus professional showcase images via Gemini 3.1 Flash.

item.title: diagram-design — 13 Editorial Diagram Types as a Claude Code Skill
item.description: Claude Code skill for 13 diagram types — architecture, flowchart, sequence — as self-contained HTML+SVG files.

item.title: Squash and Stretch: Bringing SVG Icons to Life
item.description: Interactive guide applying squash-and-stretch to SVG icons using CSS path() transitions and the Motion library.

item.title: 8 Tips for Writing Agent Skills
item.description: Practical tips for writing effective agent skills: descriptions, lean instructions, testing, and when to retire them.

item.title: Vibe coding is accelerating the erosion of design authority
item.description: Fabricio Teixeira: vibe coding shifts design authority from designers to whoever writes the prompt.

item.title: Why AI Sucks at Front-End Development
item.description: Adam Argyle breaks down why AI fails at complex CSS, component states, and accessibility — with concrete failure modes.

item.title: State of Prototyping: Spring 2026
item.description: Survey of 1,478 designers: Claude is #2 weekly tool after Figma; 59% built their own AI tool in 6 months.
